title: Luffy Pushes Toward the Fight
description: Pages 14–15 focus on luffy pushes toward the fight, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as law and Luffy push into the palace confrontation, forcing Doflamingo to face the consequences of Corazon's death.

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Cora-san knew only all too well... that if I could just beat you by virtue of my name alone I'd not need his help.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The trigger that the kind coral- San could that day not bring himself to pull,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I've come to pull in his place!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: For taking, shitty care of me all this time!!!

summary: Luffy Pushes Toward the Fight advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
